title: Bean-Bean Craft: Reforged
description:
A Tech, Magic & Exploration focused modpack designed to give a great 'Kitchen Sink' Minecraft experience.

This modpack is a re-vamp of the original Bean-Bean craft, this time utilising the Forge Modloader!
body:
# **A Tech, Magic & Exploration focused modpack designed for a small server of friends.**

This 'Kitchen Sink' style of modpack provides a vast ammount of content regardless of your preferences! 

_Main focuses of the pack include:_ 
- Design 'Create' contraptions and railroads! 
- Explore revamped and enhanced Nether and End dimensions, alongisde many new dimensions, such as the Twilight Forest, the Aether, and more!
- Enhanced travel via numerous new Boats, Trains and even Aircraft!
- Much, Much More!

![Beautiful Landscape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/680f73d1a6c436aae25a1bcbd9cc33ccc5b77e75.png)
